sections.paragraph:
δεσμός, οῦ, ὁ [δέω; the nt. pl. τὰ δεσμά is used occasionally] of a restraining medium bond, fetter

—a. of a malady that prohibits normal function Mk 7:35 (impediment); Lk 13:16.

—b. pl., of restraining devices: used to control pers. with mental disorder Lk 8:29 (τὰ δεσμά). Most freq. for detention of criminals, alleged or otherwise Ac 26:29; Hb 11:36; Jd 6; τὰ δεσμά Ac 16:26; 20:23; Phil 1:13.—With focus on experience of locale involving use of fetters Phil 1:7; Col 4:18; ἐν τοῖς δ. τοῦ εὐαγγελίου in prison for the gospel Phlm 13.
